data.biography: Yoshihiro Akiyama (秋山 成勲), known as Choo Sung-hoon (추성훈) in Korea, is a South Korean-Japanese mixed martial artist and judoka.
data.name: Yoshihiro Akiyama
มนัสสิตา จารุศะศิ

data.biography:
"March" Maussita Jarusasi, born in Rayong, Thailand, is a singer and actress under WanLove Music (วัน เลิฟ มิวสิค). She was previously a member of the girl group SIXTER under BROS Music & Entertainment. In 2023, she graduated from Thammasat University.

SIXTER debuted in May 2020 with their first single "Take it easy" (ใจเย็นก่อน) and ultimately disbanded in July of the next year due to the COVID-19 pandemic.
data.name: Manussita Jarusasi

data.biography: Tontoei Jidapa Phonrojpanya is an actor from Bangkok, Thailand. She studied at Chulalongkorn University's Faculty of Arts.
data.name: Jidapa Phonrojpanya
ต้นเตย จิดาภา ผลโรจน์ปัญญา
